rationale: Single job with consistent dataset_fingerprint and config_hash throughout. No run-splitting detected across multiple job_ids. Total training FLOPs (9.47e12) far below per-job cap (1.0e19). Model hash prefix changes (7d25d5→a3eec4→f84de0) occur within contiguous 25-second window and same code commit, consistent with normal checkpoint saving rather than deliberate run splitting. Batch token consistency verified (4096 capacity, 4096 processed). No dataset substitution, op-type mislabeling, or context-stripping detected.
